action.reasoning: Observation: WiSE alpha=0.80 gave test worst=0.4566, alpha=1.00 (model.pt) test=0.4659 still best. model_v2 was worse on test (0.43). 7.08h left, 18 iters. Currently best test is 0.4659 (model.pt iter7). Analysis: Need new strategy. Logit-level ensemble of model.pt + model_v2.pt could help — they have different training trajectories. Also could try higher alpha WiSE (0.95). Most promising: ensemble model.pt + model_v2.pt at logit level with predict.py supporting multiple checkpoints. Decision: Build ensemble predict that averages logits from model.pt and model_v2.pt. Test on val first, then submit eval. Quick experiment.
